articles.title: Cases filed against DMK, AIADMK candidates for alleged distribution of ₹8,000 coupons and ₹10,000 tokens
articles.description: Madras High Court Chief Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari and Justice G. Arul Murugan agree to hear both the cases on Friday

articles.title: Wanted activist arrested in South Africa over support for Benin coup plot
articles.description: Keba Seba is known for opposing French influence in Africa and backing West Africa's military leaders.

articles.title: Delimitation process won't be biased: PM on bill to redraw Lok Sabha constituences
articles.description: Delimitation process wont be biased PM on bill to redraw Lok Sabha constituences

topStories.title: Congress risks alienating AHINDA community in Karnataka for the sake of one family, warn Muslim leaders
topStories.description: Say the Congress had acted in violation of norms in taking action against certain leaders in connection with the Davanagere South byelection.

topStories.title: ‘Iran has to come’ to the US for the World Cup, FIFA’s Infantino says
topStories.description: FIFA chief reasserts his views on Iran's participation, saying 'the players want to play' in the tournament.

topStories.title: What are the costs of population decline?
topStories.description: What are the pros and cons of efforts to increase fertility rates? Which are the States with a growing population of the elderly? Has it reached a crisis point in some States? Will an uneven population growth shake up the federal structure? What will happen in the next round of delimitation?

topStories.title: Supreme Court refuses to interfere with Bombay HC verdict lifting stay on fraud proceedings against Anil Ambani
topStories.description: A Bench headed by CJI Surya Kant did not intervene against the Division Bench decision to set aside a Single Judge order of December last year

topStories.title: US-Iran talks: Pakistan says no dates set for second round, nuclear issues remain key, says report
topStories.description: The two sides are closer to extending a ceasefire and restarting negotiations about a longer-term peace deal, a report said, even as a standoff intensifies over the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: FIFA President Says Iran Will Participate In World Cup 'For Sure' Despite War
topStories.description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino said Wednesday that Iran will participate in the World Cup "for sure" despite its war with the United States.

topStories.title: Three Bills to tweak women's quota law, delimitation panel introduced in Lok Sabha
topStories.description: Congress leader K C Venugopal questioned why the proposed changes in the women's quota law were not incorporated when it was passed earlier by Parliament.

topStories.description: Himanta Biswa Sarma, Assam's 15th Chief Minister, has transitioned from a Congress stalwart to a BJP strategist, driving significant development initiatives.

topStories.description: The Supreme Court on Thursday rejected pleas of Anil Ambani challenging Bombay High Court order.

topStories.description: The US is imposing a military blockade of the Strait of Hormuz after Iran blocked shipping.

dailyNews.title: US military kills three in new Eastern Pacific boat strike
dailyNews.description: The attack is the latest in a string of killings by the United States that rights groups say are 'unlawful'.

dailyNews.title: Homeland Security official's killing leaves agency 'devastated' as vetting breakdown exposed
dailyNews.description: The killing of DHS official Lauren Bullis by a naturalized citizen exposes major immigration vetting failures, according to DHS and policy experts.

dailyNews.title: Viral Nikki Glaser clip prompts discussion over whether monogamy is dead
dailyNews.description: Comedian Nikki Glaser sparked a monogamy debate after saying she "kinda likes it" when her boyfriend hooks up with other women on a viral clip.

dailyNews.title: Eric Swalwell campaign paid hotel where accuser Lonna Drewes claims assault took place
dailyNews.description: Eric Swalwell faces legal probes in New York and Los Angeles after multiple women accused the former Democratic congressman of sexual assault and rape.

dailyNews.title: WWE champ Jade Cargill very hopeful to meet 'Stone Cold' Steve Austin at Hall of Fame ceremony
dailyNews.description: WWE Hall of Fame 2026 inductees include AJ Styles, Stephanie McMahon and Dennis Rodman as WrestleMania 42 weekend kicks off in Las Vegas on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Swalwell’s mounting sexual misconduct allegations threaten career beyond politics, experts warn
dailyNews.description: Eric Swalwell resigned from Congress amid sexual misconduct allegations that legal experts say could also trigger disciplinary action like disbarment.

dailyNews.title: CMLL champion Flip Gordon talks going from US Army National Guard reservist to pro wrestling ring
dailyNews.description: Former U.S. Army National Guard reservist Flip Gordon shares how military discipline shaped his path to becoming a CMLL champion in Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Las Vegas ‘pricing problem' is scaring off tourists from 'greatest city in the world,' says Rick Harrison
dailyNews.description: Las Vegas tourism dropped 7.5% last year, according to the LVCVA. Rick Harrison of "Pawn Stars" says more casinos must lower prices to keep attracting visitors to Vegas.

dailyNews.title: Who is Tom Steyer? Anti-ICE billionaire in CA governor’s race faces scrutiny over detention investments
dailyNews.description: Billionaire Tom Steyer surges to the forefront of California's governor race with a 21% lead, backed by $112 million in personal campaign donations.

dailyNews.title: Prince Harry, Meghan Markle blasted for ‘faux royal tour’ as experts accuse couple of exploiting titles
dailyNews.description: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle's four-day Australia trip draws criticism from royal experts who claim the couple is monetizing their titles and royal relevance.

dailyNews.title: Hungary’s new leader once idolized Orbán — now he’s the man who brought him down
dailyNews.description: Learn about Péter Magyar, the former Orbán insider who ended Hungary's 16-year ruling regime and is now set to lead the country into a new era.

dailyNews.title: Anna Paulina Luna says she's 'very confident' votes are there to expel Cherfilus-McCormick
dailyNews.description: Rep. Luna said bipartisan support is building to expel Rep. Cherfilus-McCormick, who was found to have committed dozens of ethics violations and is facing a pending criminal indictment.

topStories.title: Trump hits key battlegrounds to sell tax cuts, boost GOP ahead of midterms
topStories.description: President Donald Trump travels to swing states Nevada and Arizona this week to promote tax cuts passed by congressional Republicans ahead of the midterms.

topStories.title: Trump admin set to launch tariff refund portal. Here's what to know.
topStories.description: A federal agency will open a portal on April 20 that lets businesses apply for a refund for Trump tariffs struck down by the Supreme Court.

topStories.title: As U.S. birth rate falls, Trump officials downplay contraception in Title X program
topStories.description: According to new CDC data, there were 3.6 million U.S. births in 2025, a 1% decline from 2024 and down 23% since 2007. The Trump administration has said it wants to reverse this trend.

topStories.title: Trump says Iran war "close to over" amid push for new peace talks
topStories.description: With the Iran war paused halfway through a 2-week ceasefire, President Trump is again voicing optimism over the potential for a deal to end it for good.

topStories.title: 3 killed in latest U.S. strike on alleged drug boat in eastern Pacific, Pentagon says
topStories.description: President Trump has said the U.S. is in "armed conflict" with cartels in Latin America and has justified the attacks as a necessary escalation to stem the flow of drugs into the U.S.

topStories.title: Gabbard sends criminal referrals to DOJ for 2 officials linked to Trump impeachment
topStories.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard has sent criminal referrals to the Justice Department related to a government watchdog and a whistleblower whose complaint helped trigger President Trump's first impeachment.

topStories.title: What we know as Trump says China agreed not to send weapons to Iran
topStories.description: President Trump said Wednesday that China has agreed not to send weapons to Iran. Phelim Kine, the China and Indo-Pacific Affairs correspondent at Politico, joins "The Daily Report" with more.

topStories.title: Trump’s Portrayal of the War in Iran Collides With Reality
topStories.description: President Trump is confronting a crisis that is not bending to his narrative of a “pretty reasonable” new regime in Iran and all-but-assured victory for the United States.

topStories.title: Trump’s Scattershot Week, and a Stock Market Record
topStories.description: Plus, forget sneakers — Allbirds is going A.I.

topStories.title: Trump’s Quest for More Sway Over Fed Faces Fresh Hurdles
topStories.description: Jerome H. Powell’s term as chair of the Federal Reserve ends on May 15, but it appears increasingly likely that he will stay on in some capacity at the central bank after that.

topStories.title: Trump’s ‘Triumphal Arch’ Draws Backlash, Even From an Expert Who Proposed It
topStories.description: The story of how President Trump quadrupled the size of the original proposal for the arch follows a now-familiar pattern.

topStories.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon leaders to hold talks after first high-level meeting in decades
topStories.description: The U.S. president said he was "trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon."

dailyNews.title: Regulators are reportedly zeroing in on suspicious trades ahead of market-moving Trump post
dailyNews.description: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.

dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Hegseth to offer remarks on Iran amid US blockade
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Thom Tillis opens up on which Cabinet secretaries are giving Trump bad advice
dailyNews.description: Sen. Thom Tillis (R-N.C.) sits down exclusively with NBC News' Julie Tsirkin to discuss how he views President Trump’s strategy on Iran, the midterms and his choice to retire from Congress.

dailyNews.title: Senate Republicans again block Democratic effort to end Trump's Iran war
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — Senate Republicans voted down a resolution Wednesday pushed by Democrats to prohibit President Donald Trump from taking further military action in Iran

dailyNews.title: Drugmakers raised prices on hundreds of drugs despite Trump deals, report finds
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said his deals with drugmakers would bring down prescription drug prices in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: White House and DOJ separation changes under Trump
dailyNews.description: NBC News' Laura Jarrett stops by "Here's the Scoop" to discuss her interview with acting Attorney General Todd Blanche and how he sees the future of the Justice Department.
